image_prompt: SVG: line graph 'Effect of temperature on Daphnia heart rate'. x-axis 0-45 (ticks every 5, axis title intentionally blank — student must label it Temperature / °C); y-axis 0-250 (ticks every 50, axis title intentionally blank — student must label it Heart rate / bpm). Points connected: (0,70),(10,88),(20,95),(30,183),(40,224).

SVG: scatter plot of caffeine concentration vs heart rate. x-axis 'Caffeine concentration / mg per 100 cm³' 0-50 (ticks every 5); y-axis 'Heart rate / bpm' 60-90 (ticks every 5). Points: (5,70),(10,72),(15,75),(20,77),(25,81),(30,83),(35,88),(40,90). Student adds a line of best fit.
SVG: four draggable organism portraits (frog, grass, snake coiled, grasshopper) above an empty four-box arrow chain.

SVG: three nature scenes — two hippos in water with open mouths (competition); lion carrying a zebra calf in savanna (predation); mosquito with proboscis piercing human skin (parasitism). Dropdown placeholders and option list shown below.

SVG: dark instrument console with labelled controls — Hormones (three vertical sliders), Minerals Na⁺ and K⁺ gauges, Kidney Co. circular badge, Blood Pressure waveform screen, Vitamin D ON/OFF toggle, pH Balance spectrum strip.

SVG: top — instrument panel showing Blood Filtration screen (kidney with branching vessels) plus Water Level and Waste Level analog meters. Bottom — patient seated in a green recliner receiving haemodialysis from a wheeled dialysis machine, red blood tubes connecting arm to dialyzer.

topic: Labelled Daphnia (heart, egg chamber, gills, gut)
image_prompt: SVG: microscope-style view of a transparent Daphnia in pond water, labelled heart, egg chamber, gills and gut; antennae and compound eye visible. White-backed label tags with leader lines.
SVG: open spiral-bound lab notebook with 'Method' header, ruled pages, blue spiral binding. Left page Steps 1–5, right page Steps 6–8 describing the Daphnia heart-rate protocol.
SVG: open spiral-bound lab notebook, same Method (Steps 1–8) shown again as in original.
SVG: ruled two-column table headed 'Transformed data' — Temperature / °C and Average heart rate / bpm. Rows 0→70, 10→blank, 20→blank, 30→183, 40→224. Header row shaded.

topic: Carbon-cycle drag-drop chips and drop zones
